subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-09-14 in London
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, that an assemblage of utmost delicacy and perfection hath been established [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله مجلسی در نهایت لطافت و کمال تشکیل شده
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as educator, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Moses, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @spiritual transformation
